<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#e9eef2" />

  <!-- Ground -->
  <rect y="420" width="512" height="92" fill="#d0d0d0" />

  <!-- Shadow under forklift -->
  <ellipse cx="280" cy="440" rx="160" ry="20" fill="#bdbdbd" opacity="0.35" />

  <!-- Mast -->
  <rect x="100" y="120" width="40" height="320" rx="6" fill="#4a4a4a" />
  <!-- Mast inner rails -->
  <rect x="110" y="120" width="8" height="320" rx="3" fill="#323232" />
  <rect x="124" y="120" width="8" height="320" rx="3" fill="#323232" />

  <!-- Fork carriage -->
  <rect x="140" y="312" width="140" height="44" rx="6" fill="#3a3a3a" />
  <rect x="168" y="320" width="12" height="28" rx="3" fill="#222" opacity="0.3" />
  <rect x="232" y="320" width="12" height="28" rx="3" fill="#222" opacity="0.3" />

  <!-- Fork tines (two prongs) -->
  <rect x="10" y="332" width="130" height="16" rx="4" fill="#2e2e2e" />
  <rect x="10" y="356" width="130" height="16" rx="4" fill="#2e2e2e" />
  <!-- Fork tips slightly rounded using path to show thickness -->
  <path d="M10 332 q-6 0 -6 6 v-6 h6z" fill="#2e2e2e" opacity="0" />

  <!-- Body of forklift -->
  <rect x="220" y="260" width="200" height="100" rx="12" fill="#f4b400" stroke="#c58b00" stroke-width="4" />

  <!-- Cabin / counterweight area -->
  <polygon points="300,260 300,210 380,210 424,260" fill="#2b3d4a" opacity="0.95" />
  <rect x="320" y="236" width="60" height="28" rx="4" fill="#22313a" opacity="0.6" />
  <!-- Seat inside cabin -->
  <rect x="332" y="266" width="34" height="26" rx="4" fill="#1f2b33" />

  <!-- Headlight -->
  <circle cx="420" cy="300" r="10" fill="#ffd26b" stroke="#c58b00" stroke-width="2" />

  <!-- Wheels -->
  <g>
    <circle cx="170" cy="400" r="44" fill="#222" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" />
    <circle cx="170" cy="400" r="20" fill="#666" />
    <circle cx="360" cy="400" r="44" fill="#222" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" />
    <circle cx="360" cy="400" r="20" fill="#666" />
  </g>

  <!-- Overlap shading to show wheel behind body -->
  <rect x="220" y="300" width="40" height="60" fill="#e0a800" opacity="0.18" />

  <!-- Lift chains/links from carriage to top of mast -->
  <line x1="150" y1="312" x2="120" y2="140" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <line x1="170" y1="312" x2="140" y2="140" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />

  <!-- Small details on forks (edge highlight) -->
  <rect x="10" y="332" width="130" height="4" fill="#4b4b4b" opacity="0.12" />
  <rect x="10" y="356" width="130" height="4" fill="#4b4b4b" opacity="0.12" />

  <!-- Simple bumper/step -->
  <rect x="208" y="340" width="20" height="28" rx="4" fill="#c49b00" opacity="0.9" />

</svg>
